description: A hand-drawn chart/curve that grows over the beat (e.g. an exponential red growth curve).
whenToUse: A trend/growth/decline beat with a curve or line.
generalize: The curve shape, axis labels, and colour are SLOTS.
produces: Chart composition draws + animates the curve; labels = gpt-image-2 lettering.
styleLock: Chart structure is house style; a growth curve is often semantic red.
rules: Animate the curve growing over the beat.
